title: BareBones x BetterNether
description: Converts the entire mod (BetterNether) to the texture style (Barebones)
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/340bf47487efb8696d7479eed8fb169a1df54981.png)

Simply a texture pack that retexturizes the betternether in barebones style.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/320caf712b9352ba0fce4c7f9638784537673ed4.png)

⚠️CREDITS

Texture style https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones
Mod  https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betternether
